article.title: Endpoints
article.text: Returns a unique Widget Object. This is the same endpoint use for the widget displayed in the top-right corner of the suzzy games webpage.
article.quote: This endpoint returns the headers 'X-Refresh' and 'Etag'
article.text: Returns a unique Status Object. Includes the current status, an array of tracker objects, and an array of event objects which occurred today.
article.quote: This endpoint returns the headers 'X-Refresh' and 'Etag'
article.text: Notice: This endpoint is compressed with gzip. Your client must support and notify the server that it accepts gzip encoded content via the Accept-Encoding header. Otherwise your request will be rejected with a 415 Unsupported Media Type status code.
Returns an array of Event Objects for today. You can request a specific day using the query parameter date in MM/DD/YYYY format (ex. date=06/26/2003).
Returns a Unique Summary Object for this month. You can request a specific month using the query parameter date in MM/YYYY format. (ex. date=06/2003)

The results field is a JSON object with the keys being the day of the month, and it's value being an Array with three integers. Each integer represents how many seconds of Degredation, Downtime, and Maintenance occurred that day, respectively.
